# Advection { #reactix.Advection }

```python
Advection(limiter_type='minmod')
```

Handles advection terms in the 1D transport equation using TVD schemes.

This class implements numerical advection using Total Variation Diminishing (TVD)
schemes with selectable limiters to prevent oscillations near discontinuities.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type   | Description                                                                           | Default    |
|--------------|--------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| limiter_type | str    | Type of slope limiter to use. Options: "minmod", "upwind", "MC". Default is "minmod". | `'minmod'` |

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

The advection scheme reconstructs interface values using slope limiters
to maintain monotonicity and stability in the solution.

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [build](#reactix.Advection.build) | Build an Advection instance with a specified slope limiter. |
| [choose_upwind_concentration](#reactix.Advection.choose_upwind_concentration) | Select the upwind concentration based on the direction of flow. |
| [compute_slope](#reactix.Advection.compute_slope) | Compute limited slope with padding at boundaries. |
| [mc_limiter](#reactix.Advection.mc_limiter) | Monotonized central (MC) limiter. |
| [minmod](#reactix.Advection.minmod) | Return the standard minmod limited slope. |
| [minmod3](#reactix.Advection.minmod3) | Minmod of three values, for MC limiter. |
| [rate](#reactix.Advection.rate) | Compute the advection rate for mobile species. |

### build { #reactix.Advection.build }

```python
Advection.build(limiter_type)
```

Build an Advection instance with a specified slope limiter.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name         | Type   | Description                                                            | Default    |
|--------------|--------|------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|
| limiter_type | str    | Type of slope limiter to use. Options are "minmod", "upwind", or "MC". | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type      | Description                  |
|--------|-----------|------------------------------|
|        | Advection | Configured advection scheme. |

### choose_upwind_concentration { #reactix.Advection.choose_upwind_concentration }

```python
Advection.choose_upwind_concentration(left_state, right_state, discharge)
```

Select the upwind concentration based on the direction of flow.

### compute_slope { #reactix.Advection.compute_slope }

```python
Advection.compute_slope(concentration, dx_center)
```

Compute limited slope with padding at boundaries.

### mc_limiter { #reactix.Advection.mc_limiter }

```python
Advection.mc_limiter(a, b)
```

Monotonized central (MC) limiter.

### minmod { #reactix.Advection.minmod }

```python
Advection.minmod(a, b)
```

Return the standard minmod limited slope.

### minmod3 { #reactix.Advection.minmod3 }

```python
Advection.minmod3(a, b, c)
```

Minmod of three values, for MC limiter.

### rate { #reactix.Advection.rate }

```python
Advection.rate(time, state, system)
```

Compute the advection rate for mobile species.

#### Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name   | Type            | Description                     | Default    |
|--------|-----------------|---------------------------------|------------|
| time   | jax.Array       | Current simulation time.        | _required_ |
| state  | AbstractSpecies | Current species concentrations. | _required_ |
| system | TransportSystem | The reactive transport system.  | _required_ |

#### Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type            | Description                                   |
|--------|-----------------|-----------------------------------------------|
|        | AbstractSpecies | Advection contribution to the rate of change. |
